after.head: b73e8a2479322fc3fa79b3533b8e35035fed59f8 + Pass68 patch

lever: Exact borrowed row-major I64 add scan path for shared scalar init, batch axis 0, rank-2 xs. It bypasses move_batch_dim_to_front cloning and the per-element Literal operation matcher.

isomorphism_proof.acceptance: Only accepts unbatched I64 scalar or scalar-tensor init, I64 rank-2 xs with batch_dim 0, body_op missing or add, valid row-major element count. All other cases fall back to the previous scalar scan path.
isomorphism_proof.ordering: Rows are emitted in ascending batch index. Within each row, scan_idx order matches the prior forward/reverse loops.
isomorphism_proof.arithmetic: Uses i64::wrapping_add, matching the prior apply_scan_scalar_op Add branch and fj-lax signed integer add semantics.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No scheduling, sorting, branch-selection, or tie-breaking behavior is touched.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No F32/F64 path is accepted by the new helper; existing FP behavior falls back unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state or sampling behavior is touched.

validation: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-dispatch scan_batched_xs -- --nocapture (shared tree; 7 tests passed)
rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-dispatch scan_shared_i64_add -- --nocapture (shared tree; 1 test passed)
rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-dispatch (clean patched worktree; 247 unit tests, 55 integration tests, doc-tests passed)
rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-dispatch --all-targets (clean patched worktree; passed)
rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings (clean patched worktree; passed)
notes: The shared working tree had unrelated dirty fj-lax/src/reduction.rs edits that made RCH bench fail with missing local variable `strides`; clean detached worktrees were used for the fair baseline/rebench and crate build gates.
No peer-owned fj-lax or backend-cpu files were edited or staged by this pass.
